meta.question: Navigate to "TMT-APS Use Cases" and enumarate the top-level use cases.
meta.finalAnswer:
The "TMT-APS Use Cases" package was found at: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::09 Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS Use Cases

However, the actual top-level use cases are organized under "APS Mission Use Cases" in the operational mission hierarchy. Here are the **17 top-level APS use cases** found:

1. **Acquisition**
2. **Align M1 segments in TT**
3. **Align M3**
4. **Calibrate APS**
5. **Calibrate M1 Edge Sensors**
6. **Calibrate elevation dependence of M2 and M3**
7. **Calibration of Camera Pointing Offsets**
8. **Calibration pupil locations**
9. **Collect Reference Beam**
10. **Maintenance Alignment**
11. **Measurement of segment warping harness influence functions**
12. **Off-Axis measurements of WFE**
13. **Post-Segment Exchange Alignment**
14. **Rigid Body and Segment Figure correction**
15. **Self Test**
16. **Swap optics in Pupil Wheel slot** (in RecycleBin)
17. **Acquire a target with IRIS and NFIRAOS** (TMT Mission use case)

The primary APS-specific use cases (items 1-15) relate to the Alignment and Phasing System operations for the TMT telescope.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT-APS Use Cases"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?name), "TMT-APS Use Cases")) .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 10

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT-APS Use Cases"))) .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 10

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Use Cases"))) .
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:package .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?pkg rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?name, "Use Cases"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?name, "APS"))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem a ?type .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STR(?elem) CONTAINS "TMT-APS%20Use%20Cases")
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?elem a ?type .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?elem), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%2520Use%2520Cases"))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20Use%20Cases" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?useCase .
  ?useCase rdf:type ?type .
}
GROUP BY ?type
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

request.reason: Found 17 use cases in the model. The "TMT-APS Use Cases" package appears to be a documentation view, while the actual use case elements are located under "APS Mission Use Cases" in the operational mission hierarchy. These represent the top-level APS use cases.
